Desc: Reduced credit card fraud detection false positives by 34% through rules engine overhaul.
Launched contactless payment rollout across 12 NAM partner retailers.
Achieved PCI DSS recertification with zero remediation items.
Migrated legacy mainframe batch jobs to cloud-native microservices, cutting processing time by 60%.
Deployed zero-trust network architecture across all NAM data centers.
Stood up enterprise-wide API gateway serving 2M+ daily requests.
Onboarded 150 high-net-worth clients onto the new digital wealth management platform.
Implemented real-time cross-border wire transfer tracking for LATAM corridor.
Reduced private banking client onboarding time from 14 days to 3 days.
Launched virtual credit card product for EU market, acquiring 20K users in first quarter.
Achieved full PSD2 Strong Customer Authentication compliance ahead of regulatory deadline.
Integrated real-time currency conversion for multi-currency card spending across 8 EU countries.
Built unified data lake consolidating 5 legacy APAC banking systems into a single platform.
Delivered disaster recovery failover capability with sub-30-second RTO for core banking.
Automated 80% of infrastructure provisioning through IaC templates, reducing deployment lead time by 70%.
Rolled out AI-driven portfolio rebalancing tool for EU private banking advisors.
Achieved GDPR audit compliance across all EU private banking client data workflows.
Reduced advisor-to-client reporting turnaround from 5 business days to same-day delivery.
